action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py simulation works correctly - 93.3% success rate on fake test data. The previous eval returned 0 episodes because predict.py had path issues. Now it correctly reads eval_config.json with relative paths. Analysis: Need to submit eval to get real baseline score. The planner is heuristic-based (greedy utility + BFS path planning). Decision: Submit eval immediately to get baseline score and verify predict.py works in the real evaluator.
